title: W3 sync half: config-rendered bee agent files + AO10-safe flat onboarding sync + inventories
action: Per plan.md 'Slice 3B design settled at planning' items 1-2-5 and AO5/AO10/AO11: (1) create three agent templates under skills/bee-hive/templates/agents/ — bee-gather.md.tmpl (tools: read-only set, model from claude generation slot), bee-extract.md.tmpl (read-only, extraction slot), bee-review.md.tmpl (review slot; may run commands read-only) — frontmatter name/description/tools/model with a {{TIER_MODEL}} placeholder, body = short worker contract in Claude Code agent-definition format (digest back with file:line anchors; gather/extract never write; no session history expected). (2) onboard_bee.mjs: new flat managed-file sync step (NOT REPO_SKILL_TARGETS — AO10: adding an agents root there resolves 'unknown' and bricks onboarding non-forceably; keep it the settings-json-merge class): render each template with {{TIER_MODEL}} = modelForTier(root, slot, 'claude'); write to <repo>/.claude/agents/bee-*.md; a cli-shaped or null slot SKIPS that file and removes a previously-synced copy; record agents_sync {bee_version, files, rendered_from: {slot: model}} in .bee/onboarding.json as the sync's own version marker. Codex: .agents/ gets NO agent files — document the asymmetry in the sync record (AO11). (3) Teach every generator inventory in this same cell (learning Addendum 2): test_onboard_bee.mjs gains rows (agents rendered with configured models; cli-slot skip; re-render idempotent; marker recorded); test_installers_e2e.mjs expectations if the installer path exercises onboarding agents; plugin_distribution.mjs only if it inventories the new class (check; if untouched, say so in the report). (4) Self-onboard this repo so .claude/agents/bee-*.md exist rendered from the live config (generation=sonnet, extraction=haiku, review=opus) and mirrors resync. No cost-reduction claims anywhere. FINAL STEP: node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write, then the cell verify — --check green.

truths: three agent files render into .claude/agents/ with model values taken from live config, never hardcoded in the template output path
a cli-shaped or null tier slot skips (and removes) its agent file, recorded in the sync record
onboarding.json carries the agents_sync marker with bee_version and rendered_from
.agents/ receives no agent files; the asymmetry is recorded (AO11)
re-running self-onboard is idempotent (same bytes, marker refreshed)
onboard/installers/distribution suites green with new rows
artifacts: rendered .claude/agents/bee-review.md head quoted in the report (frontmatter shows model: opus from config)
prohibitions: no REPO_SKILL_TARGETS entry for agents (AO10 — bricks onboarding)
no static model pins in rendered output that bypass config
no edits outside bounded files (release-manifest.json only via release_manifest.mjs --write)

verify: node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && node scripts/test_installers_e2e.mjs --installer bash && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_plugin_distribution.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Config-rendered pinned agent types (bee-gather/bee-extract/bee-review) shipped: new skills/bee-hive/templates/agents/*.md.tmpl templates render {{TIER_MODEL}} from the host's own models.claude tier config (AO5) via a new AO10-safe flat managed-file sync in onboard_bee.mjs (NOT REPO_SKILL_TARGETS), writing .claude/agents/bee-*.md; a cli-shaped or unset-to-null tier skips and removes its file; the sync's own version marker (agents_sync: {bee_version, files, rendered_from, codex}) lands in .bee/onboarding.json, recording the Codex asymmetry inline (AO11 - no .agents/ agent files, no per-agent model selection). test_onboard_bee.mjs and test_installers_e2e.mjs gained rows per today's generator-inventory learning (Addendum 2); plugin_distribution.mjs inspected and left untouched (does not inventory this file class). Self-onboarded this repo (generation=sonnet, extraction=haiku, review=opus) and regenerated the release manifest.
trace.verify_output: test_onboard_bee.mjs: PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1 (incl. new agent-file rows: render+model-from-config x3, {{TIER_MODEL}} unrendered check, cost-claim guard, AO10 REPO_SKILL_TARGETS regression guard, AO11 no-.agents/agents check, onboarding.json agents_sync bee_version/files/rendered_from/codex asymmetry checks, idempotent-reapply byte-identity, cli-shaped-review skip+remove+recheck up_to_date, AGENT_TIER_DEFAULTS_CLAUDE no-drift vs state.mjs). test_installers_e2e.mjs --installer bash: 16 passed, 0 failed (incl. new greenfield row asserting .claude/agents/bee-{gather,extract,review}.md render via the real install.sh path and no .agents/agents root). test_plugin_distribution.mjs: 28 passed, 0 failed (untouched - does not inventory the new agent-file class, confirmed by inspection). release_manifest.mjs --check: 146 file(s) match stored manifest (after --write regen).
trace.verify_command: node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && node scripts/test_installers_e2e.mjs --installer bash && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_plugin_distribution.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check
